first_evidence.name: First Clue
first_evidence.description: Find your first piece of crucial evidence.

obsessed.name: Why Are You So Obsessed With Me?
obsessed.description: End the game with a score of exactly 180.

survived_the_hospital.name: Hospital Survived
survived_the_hospital.description: Make it through Hope River Hospital.

quick_reflexes.name: Quick Reflexes
quick_reflexes.description: Successfully react to a sudden danger.

speedrun.name: Speedrun
speedrun.description: Complete a scenario with exceptional speed.

vacuum_wrassler.name: Vacuum Wrassler
vacuum_wrassler.description: Successfully disable the robo-vacuum by grabbing it.

safety_first_hero.name: Safety First, Hero
safety_first_hero.description: Safely disable the sparking robo-vacuum with insulated hands.

quick_thinking.name: Quick Thinking
quick_thinking.description: Perform an emergency shutdown on the moving robo-vacuum.

thermal_management.name: Thermal Management
thermal_management.description: Prevent a robotic hazard from exploding by cooling it down.

common_sense.name: Common Sense Prevails
common_sense.description: Unplug a hazard before it could become a bigger problem.

electrical_dodge.name: Dances With Lightning
electrical_dodge.description: Dodge a direct electrical attack from a malfunctioning machine.

electrical_engineer.name: Electrical Engineer
electrical_engineer.description: Avert a catastrophic electrical explosion by grounding the source.

lightning_reflexes.name: Lightning Reflexes
lightning_reflexes.description: Escape an electrical explosion just in the nick of time.

magnetic_mayhem.name: Magnetic Mayhem
magnetic_mayhem.description: Witness a hazard get destroyed by a powerful magnetic field.

first_save.name: Safe and Sound
first_save.description: Successfully saved your progress for the first time. Your fate is preserved... for now.

witness_to_death.name: Witness to Death
witness_to_death.description: Witness a victim perish during a hazard sequence.

chaos_redirector.name: Chaos Redirector
chaos_redirector.description: Cleverly redirect a rampaging hazard, causing it to destroy itself.

lore_master.name: Lore Master
lore_master.description: Unlock your first full story backstory in the journal.

historian.name: Historian
historian.description: Unlock 5 story backstories in the journal.

completionist.name: Completionist
completionist.description: Unlock every single story in the Final Destination universe.

cheating_death.name: Cheating Death
cheating_death.description: Heed the Visionary's warning and escape the Level 0 disaster.

no_one_left_behind.name: No One Left Behind
no_one_left_behind.description: Convince every single person to evacuate during the premonition.

cassandra_truth.name: The Cassandra Truth
cassandra_truth.description: Escape the disaster alone. No one listened to you.

ghost_in_the_garage.name: Ghost in the Garage
ghost_in_the_garage.description: Slip past the police cordon at the hospital completely undetected.

accomplice.name: Accomplice
accomplice.description: Recruit the Visionary to join you at the police station.

the_design_revealed.name: The Design Revealed
the_design_revealed.description: Learn the exact order of Death's list.

bludworths_disciple.name: Bludworth's Disciple
bludworths_disciple.description: Secure the key to William Bludworth's house.

not_today.name: Not Today
not_today.description: Successfully execute an Agility Dodge to avoid a fatal hazard.

brute_force.name: Brute Force
brute_force.description: Successfully force open a locked door or container.
